goal: All 15 accounts fully monetized — generating passive USD revenue from US audience

youtube_partner_program.name: YouTube Partner Program (YPP)
youtube_partner_program.revenue_type: AdSense CPM + Channel Memberships + Super Thanks

shorts_only_path.note: 10M Shorts views path — achievable with 5-channel × daily posting strategy

youtube_partner_program.action: Apply via YouTube Studio > Earn > Apply once threshold is hit. Takes 1–30 days for review.
youtube_partner_program.acceleration: Long-form 10-20 min compilations build watch hours. Shorts build sub count simultaneously.

tiktok_creator_rewards.name: TikTok Creator Rewards Program
tiktok_creator_rewards.rate: $1 per 1,000 qualified views (US audience views pay highest)

requirements.note: Must post ORIGINAL content — reposts/clipped content must add commentary or transformation

tiktok_creator_rewards.originality_strategy: Add text overlays, captions with commentary, or voice-over to every clip. This transforms repurposed content into 'original' under TikTok's definition.
tiktok_creator_rewards.also_consider: TikTok LIVE Gifts — enabled at 1,000 followers. Schedule weekly lives for additional revenue.

instagram_reels_bonus.name: Instagram Reels Play Bonus
instagram_reels_bonus.rate: Variable — $0.01–$0.05 per view depending on invitation tier

requirements.eligibility: INVITATION ONLY — Instagram invites based on Reels performance
requirements.music_rights: Use royalty-free or Instagram music library only

instagram_reels_bonus.primary_revenue_path: Until Reels Bonus invitation, Instagram revenue comes from ManyChat lead capture → email list → affiliate / digital product sales. Higher value than direct ad rev at small scale.

affiliate_and_sponsorships.name: Affiliate Marketing + Sponsorships

best_programs.fit: Tech products, books, equipment in video descriptions

affiliate_and_sponsorships.minimum_for_sponsorship: 10,000 followers + US audience = first $200–500/post sponsors start appearing
affiliate_and_sponsorships.action: Add affiliate links to all video descriptions from Day 1. Zero threshold required.

priority_order: 1. YouTube AdSense (highest RPM, most reliable, $8-25 RPM US audience)
2. TikTok Creator Rewards (fastest to 10K followers with 3 posts/day strategy)
3. Affiliate links in all bios/descriptions (zero threshold, starts earning Day 1)
4. Instagram Reels Bonus (invitation-based, focus on view volume first)
5. Sponsorships (unlocks at 10K+ followers on any platform)

month1.note: Setup + posting. Zero revenue. Focus on consistency.

month2.note: First accounts hit 100-500 subs. Affiliate clicks start.

month3.note: First YPP approvals. TikTok Creator Rewards on 1-2 accounts.

monthly_revenue_projections.disclaimer: Projections assume daily posting + US audience targeting + no copyright strikes
